creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
According to bento's log, vje30 ports fails its build
	because they try to install some symlinks under X11BASE
	without a declaration of USE_X*=yes.

Fix: 

-- 
                           /
                          /__  __
                         / )  )  ) )  /
Akinori -Aki- MUSHA aka / (_ /  ( (__(  <knu@idaemons.org>

"If you choose not to decide you still have made a choice."--9xhrCdE2fbZJN89bdr3hZ36TDQ8YY2kPpj9Q9Xh3LL0TABgz
